    415 -        "SELECT sql FROM sqlite_master WHERE type = 'table' AND name = 'agents'"
    416 -    ).fetchone()
    417 -    if row is None or "'sentinel'" not in str(row["sql"]):
    418 -        return
    419 -
    420 -    conn.executescript(
    421 -        """
    422 -        PRAGMA foreign_keys = OFF;
    423 -        BEGIN;
    424 -        DELETE FROM agents WHERE role = 'sentinel';
    425 -        ALTER TABLE agents RENAME TO agents_old_sentinel_migration;
    426 -        CREATE TABLE agents (
    427 -            agent_id          TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
    428 -            role              TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (role IN
    429 -                              ('collaborator','notetaker','crow_handler','crow','planner','planning_handler')),
    430 -            ticket_id         TEXT REFERENCES tickets(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
    431 -            session           TEXT,
    432 -            status            TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (status IN
    433 -                              ('idle','running','blocked','escalating','done','failed','dead')),
    434 -            start_commit      TEXT,
    435 -            started_at        TEXT NOT NULL,
    436 -            last_heartbeat_at TEXT,
    437 -            pid               INTEGER
    438 -        );
    439 -        INSERT INTO agents
    440 -            (agent_id, role, ticket_id, session, status, start_commit,
    441 -             started_at, last_heartbeat_at, pid)
    442 -        SELECT agent_id, role, ticket_id, session, status, start_commit,
    443 -               started_at, last_heartbeat_at, pid
    444 -          FROM agents_old_sentinel_migration;
    445 -        DROP TABLE agents_old_sentinel_migration;
    446          COMMIT;

• Explored
